## Summary

Describe the problem, the approach, and why this is the right fix.

## Changes

- High-level bullet list of notable changes
- Mention any CLI flags/outputs/config keys that changed

## Screenshots / CLI Output

Paste relevant terminal output, logs, or short screenshots for TUI/CLI.

## Tests

- What tests were added or updated?
- How did you validate locally? Include commands and results.

## Checklist

- [ ] Ran `make fmt lint test coverage-check`
- [ ] Ran `make security` (gosec, govulncheck)
- [ ] Coverage ≥ 85% (or justified)
- [ ] Updated `docs/` and `examples/` if behavior or config changed
- [ ] No secrets in code/logs; config via env/flags/`config.yaml`

## Linked Issues

Closes #<id> / Related to #<id>
